title: PET WELLNESS CLINIC - 211info
text: SAFEHAVEN HUMANE SOCIETY PET WELLNESS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a preventative care wellness clinic that includes low-cost preventative care services such as vaccines, flea control, dewormer, and microchips for both dogs and cats. 32220 Old Highway 34 Tangent, OR 973899770 Eligibility: Unrestricted. All pets must be safely handleable by medical team. Any pets that are a risk to staff safely will not be eligible to receive services. Not able to take in feral cats for any services. Hours: 1st Friday of the month 10am-2pm Email (541) 928-2789 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 928-2789 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to sign up for an appointment. Walk ins welcome but there may be a wait time. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Vaccine and veterinarian records AREA SERVED: Linn and Benton Counties Services: Sick Animal Care Well Animal Checkups Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMAL ADOPTION DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET FOOD PANTRY DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PETS ARE FAMILY FUND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFEHAVEN HUMANE SOCIETY
